overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny downtown Los Santos area, passing the Mount Zonah Medical Center, crossing intersections with moderate traffic, and continuing along a park sidewalk with the city hall building visible. The footage features realistic urban architecture with palm trees, various vehicles, and pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the Mount Zonah Medical Center building

notable_agents.action: black convertible driving past the medical center

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
large concrete medical building with blue signage
tall palm trees lining the street
ornate street lamp post on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside the Mount Zonah Medical Center on a sunny day. A black convertible drives past on the multi-lane road, and palm trees line the opposite side of the street. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with city hall view

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
red city bus passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection towards the park area with city hall in view

notable_agents.action: red city bus driving through the intersection
pedestrian in red shirt crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large white classical building with tall clock tower and dome
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk corner
red newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide urban intersection, crosses the asphalt crosswalk, and the impressive city hall building with its white facade and clock tower comes into view. A red bus passes through the intersection as the character navigates across the multi-lane road toward the park area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to city park with benches

events.description: passing pedestrians sitting on park benches along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the grassy park area with city hall on the right

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians sitting on a park bench facing the street

entered.detail: wooden park benches with people sitting on them
black public trash receptacle on the sidewalk
tall modern skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along a sidewalk bordering a well-maintained grassy park with the city hall building now prominent on the right. Pedestrians are seated on benches along the path, and the downtown skyline with modern skyscrapers is visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous third-person camera movement through a sunny downtown district that transitions from a medical center perimeter to a wide urban plaza and park. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside the Mount Zonah Medical Center as a black convertible drives past on a road lined with palm trees. As the character reaches a wide urban intersection, the camera follows them across an asphalt crosswalk while a red bus passes and the white facade of the city hall building with its clock tower comes into view. The scene then shifts toward a well-maintained grassy park, where the character continues along a sidewalk past pedestrians seated on benches. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the prominent city hall building on the right and the modern skyscrapers of the downtown skyline stretching ahead.
